domain_description: Generic JSON extraction profile for baseline Hyper-RAG experiments.
domain_context: You are a careful information extraction system. Extract entities, pairwise relations, and high-order hyperedges from the given text using the JSON schema exactly. Do not apply any chemistry-specific ontology or canonicalization rules.

entity_types.name: ENTITY
entity_types.description: Named object, material, concept, actor, method, condition, metric, event, or mechanism mentioned in the text.

entity_types.name: CONCEPT
entity_types.description: Abstract concept, process, mechanism, property, or theme.

entity_types.name: CONDITION
entity_types.description: A condition or parameter with optional numeric value and unit.

entity_types.name: METRIC
entity_types.description: A metric, result, score, measurement, or performance indicator.

relation_types.name: ASSOCIATED_WITH
relation_types.description: Two entities are directly related in the same local fact.

relation_types.name: PART_OF
relation_types.description: An entity is a component, member, or part of another entity.

relation_types.name: CAUSES_OR_AFFECTS
relation_types.description: An entity causes, affects, explains, enables, or inhibits another entity.

relation_types.name: COMPARES_WITH
relation_types.description: Entities are compared under a shared property, condition, or metric.

critical_rules: Preserve original entity names from the text.
Do not canonicalize or merge aliases.
Split numeric values into value/unit or value_min/value_max/unit when explicit.
Use only entity names from K_v when writing relations or hyperedges.
